impacts.statement: Widespread, major flooding occurs along the reach of the river.
Moderate flooding with areas close to the Colorado River submerged.
Considerable lowland flooding occurs with trails and foot bridges along and crossing the river flooded.
Approaches to foot bridges and trails along and crossing the river are flooded.
Water begins to impact low lying areas along the river.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.
